Title: Verify Resident Registration (Valid Data)
Objective: Ensure resident can create an account with valid information
Preconditions: User is on Resident Sign-Up page
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Sign-Up page
2. Fill required personal details
3. Upload valid Barangay ID and face image
4. Enter strong password and confirmation
5. Click Create Account
Test Data: Name: Juan Cruz; Email: juancruz@email.com; Phone: 09123456789; Password: Qwerty_12345; ID: valid image; Face: valid capture
Expected Result: Resident account is created and user is redirected to sign-in

Title: Validate Required Fields in Registration
Objective: Ensure required fields are enforced in resident registration
Preconditions: User is on Resident Sign-Up page
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Sign-Up page
2. Leave one or more required fields empty
3. Click Create Account
Test Data: Missing First Name and Phone Number
Expected Result: System blocks submission and shows required field validation messages

Title: Validate Password Strength in Registration
Objective: Ensure weak passwords are rejected
Preconditions: User is on Resident Sign-Up page
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Sign-Up page
2. Enter weak password
3. Submit form
Expected Result: System rejects password and shows policy message (uppercase lowercase number symbol)

Title: Validate Password Confirmation Mismatch
Objective: Ensure confirm password must match password
Preconditions: User is on Resident Sign-Up page
Test Steps:
1. Fill all required fields
2. Enter different values in Password and Confirm Password
3. Submit form
Expected Result: Submission is blocked and mismatch validation message is displayed

Title: Prevent Duplicate Resident Email Registration
Objective: Ensure system does not allow duplicate resident email
Preconditions: Existing resident account with email already exists
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Sign-Up page
2. Enter existing email with new profile data
3. Submit form
Expected Result: Registration fails with duplicate email message

Title: Resident Login (Valid Credentials)
Objective: Ensure resident can sign in with valid credentials
Preconditions: Resident account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Login page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Click Login
Expected Result: Resident is authenticated and redirected to resident dashboard/home

Title: Resident Login (Invalid Credentials)
Objective: Ensure authentication fails with wrong credentials
Preconditions: Resident login page is accessible
Test Steps:
1. Open Resident Login page
2. Enter invalid password
3. Click Login
Expected Result: System denies login and displays invalid credentials message

Title: Forgot Password - Send OTP
Objective: Ensure OTP is sent for valid account recovery request
Preconditions: Resident account with registered email exists
Test Steps:
1. Open Forgot Password page
2. Enter registered email
3. Click Send OTP
Expected Result: System generates and sends OTP to registered contact and shows next step prompt

Title: Forgot Password - Verify OTP
Objective: Ensure only valid OTP can proceed to password reset
Preconditions: OTP was requested and not expired
Test Steps:
1. Enter received OTP
2. Click Verify
Expected Result: System accepts OTP and allows access to reset password page

Title: Forgot Password - Reject Invalid OTP
Objective: Ensure invalid or expired OTP is rejected
Preconditions: OTP verification page is open
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid or expired OTP
2. Click Verify
Expected Result: System blocks verification and shows invalid/expired OTP message

Title: Reset Password (Valid New Password)
Objective: Ensure user can reset password after OTP verification
Preconditions: OTP has been successfully verified
Test Steps:
1. Open reset password form
2. Enter strong new password and confirm
3. Submit
Expected Result: Password is updated and user can log in using new password

Title: View Resident Profile
Objective: Ensure resident can view profile information
Preconditions: Resident is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Login as resident
2. Open profile page
Expected Result: Profile page loads and displays current resident details correctly

Title: Update Resident Profile (Valid Data)
Objective: Ensure resident profile updates are saved

Test Steps:
1. Edit profile fields
2. Save changes
Expected Result: System saves updates and shows success message

Title: Resident List Pending Applications

Title: Decline Resident Application

1. Open pending residents list
2. Select resident
3. Click Decline
4. Enter reason
Expected Result: System marks application as declined and stores reason

Title: Session Logout
Objective: Ensure logout invalidates session/token and blocks protected pages
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Click Logout
2. Try opening protected route directly
Expected Result: User is redirected to login and protected APIs reject old session/token

Title: File Upload Validation (Invalid Type)
Objective: Ensure invalid upload formats are rejected
Preconditions: User is on upload form (ID/evidence/profile)
Test Steps:
1. Select disallowed file type
2. Submit upload
Expected Result: System rejects upload and returns allowed file type message

Title: File Upload Validation (Oversized File)
Objective: Ensure upload size limits are enforced
Preconditions: User is on upload form
Test Steps:
1. Select file larger than allowed size
2. Submit
Expected Result: System rejects upload and shows file size limit error
